label: OPUS CANDIDATE — REQUIRES FRESH FABLE REVIEW BEFORE MERGE
task: Owner-requested 3-pass orthing supplementation: identify orthemmata (OSM/latent, daee-runtime, epistemology, meta-noetic memetics, noetic field topology, recursive governed gradient descent) and supplement the papers — robust/academic/accurate, no fluff.

attachments: maximaltrajectory.md (vision doc — claims to be BOUNDED, not imported)
inputs.corpus: all orthemology papers + prior PDFs/prompts as metaortheme source

model_provenance.note: Owner explicitly requested multi-agent orchestration (~12 subagents per pass, ~36 total). This overrides the R7D sequential constraint (which was specific to the R7D controlling prompt). Orchestration used to IDENTIFY + adversarially VERIFY; the main loop INTEGRATES survivors with CI green.

may: create branch candidate/r7e-orthing-supplementation from R7D head e34d2cd
integrate adversarially-verified survivors as candidate supplementation
open ONE draft PR into the R7D branch
must_not: import daee objects as core primitives

governing_metaorthemes: daee firewall: read-only application pinned to c86b3c66; co-development != validation; no import as core primitive; deformations are ortheme-level candidates not metaorthemes
OSM boundary: bounded computational/learning/representation claims; no biological/human/metaphysical/theological transfer
reason/revelation + evidence firewall; conformance != consistency/empirical proof
sourcing discipline: five-status hierarchy; secondary != primary; no phantom sources
no overclaim, no fluff (maximaltrajectory.md rhetoric bounded, not imported)
candidate-only; settled core 0001-0022 not reopened; provenance preserved; nothing merged

phase_log.design: Pass 1 (12 agents, generative + bounded drafts) -> Pass 2 (12 agents, read-only discovery, blind) -> dedup barrier -> Pass 3 (12 agents, adversarial keep/bound/reject). Agents identify+verify (read-only); main loop integrates survivors.
phase_log.result: 36 agents, 0 errors, 4.9M subagent tokens, ~40 min. 237 candidates -> 221 adversarially-survived (99 keep / 122 bound) / 16 rejected. Adversarial pass caught fabricated premises ('central factual claims FALSE against the pin'), Firewall-1 breaches (citing daee script paths as evidence), and a citation miscite (ninety-ninety rule).

Applied a SECOND stricter curation filter (221 survivors is too many to integrate wholesale = bloat). Curated to 24 firewall-clean, framework's-own-structural (orthemological-extension / cross-source-synthesis), no-new-external-citation items. Integrated a focused, individually-verified subset of 8 highest-value + cleanest: (1-3) SOUND-DESCENT G1 staleness fix — adopted->proposed-candidate, 'locally sound'->admissible governed corrective transition, verdict corrected (consistent with R7D Decision 0033); (4) SOUND-DESCENT div/curl require an explicit multi-node target field; (5) SOUND-DESCENT literal-optimization-exists-in-OSM-training-but-does-not-transfer [primary DOI]; (6) companion 8.2 two-numbered-scales (modalities vs rungs) do-not-conflate; (7) companion gap-invariance rung3->rung4 is/ought + YAML non_entailment; (8) companion 12 absence/falsifiability conditions. Full 221 survivors + 16 rejected recorded in ORTHING-CANDIDATE-BACKLOG.md for fresh-Fable triage (sourcing labels are agent claims; classical primary-text additions NOT integrated — need located loci per repo discipline).
phase_log.suite: 55/55 green; manifest clean; 6 PDFs byte-equal (companion rebuilt 6pp, zero notdef)
phase_log.next_action: Commit; open draft PR into the R7D branch; closeout.

no_merge_statement: R7E is an Opus CANDIDATE supplementation pass on its own branch. Nothing is merged. A fresh Fable session must review every added hunk (sourcing, firewalls, substance) before any protected merge.
